[669.430-722.850] interviewee: to see him in the evening. I met other people there-- the members and the board of directors. And I went another night and another night. And I started to join it.
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: And in no time after a couple of weeks, they put me already on the board of directors. And in a few months, I became the leader of the organization in Katowice. And we had branches naturally all over Poland. And in our state of Silesia, there were branches too. And it became
